transcript.speaker: DeciBio Moderator
transcript.text: Thank you for joining us today. Can you tell me about your lab's current sequencing setup?

transcript.speaker: Stakeholder
transcript.text: We're running mostly Illumina. We have the NovaSeq 6000 and a couple of MiSeqs for smaller runs. We do a lot of oncology panels, solid tumor primarily.

transcript.speaker: DeciBio Moderator
transcript.text: How do you handle reimbursement for these panels?

transcript.speaker: Stakeholder
transcript.text: We bill under CPT 81445 for solid tumor and 81455 for the larger panels. United and Cigna both require prior auth now, which has been challenging.

Key Themes: Lab runs Illumina NovaSeq 6000 and MiSeq instruments for oncology panels
Prior authorization requirements from major payers are a significant operational burden
Notable Quotes: "United and Cigna both require prior auth now, which has been challenging." — Stakeholder
IVD Platform & Competitive Landscape: Primary platform: Illumina NovaSeq 6000 for high-throughput runs
MiSeq used for smaller, lower-volume testing
Workflow & Utilization Patterns: Focus on solid tumor oncology panels
Reimbursement & Coding: Prior auth required by United and Cigna
Forward-Looking Signals: No forward-looking signals captured in this excerpt
